div.h2: Bytecode VM Stack State Transition Diagram

p.em: This diagram illustrates how operator precedence is naturally enforced by stack-based execution.

div.p: Stack order enforces the Order of Operations (PEMDAS/BODMAS):

ol.li: Post-Order Generation: The compiler traverses the expression tree (10 - (3 * 2)) in post-order, ensuring children are processed before parents.

Evaluation Order:
LOAD_CONST operations populate the stack.
MUL pops the top two values (2, 3) and pushes the result (6).
SUB then finds its expected operands: the original 10 and the calculated 6.
Data Dependency: SUB cannot execute until MUL returns its result to the stack.
